overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural countryside. The scene is set during golden hour with warm sunset lighting, passing sunflower fields and approaching a medieval village with stone towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path with sunflower fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through sunflower fields toward the distant village

entered.detail: Dense field of sunflowers lining the left side of the path
Winding dirt trail through the countryside
Stone castle towers and village buildings visible on the horizon
Rustic wooden fence posts along the right side of the path
Scattered trees framing the left side of the landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through rural farmland during golden hour. Sunflowers line the left side while a wooden fence runs along the right, with medieval castle towers visible in the distant haze.

events.description: sunflower field ends as path curves right into open grassland

agents.ego_description: Geralt follows the curving path as it bends to the right through open fields

entered.detail: Open grassland replacing the sunflower field on the right side
Low stone wall appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves through open countryside as the sunflower field gives way to grassy meadows. Stone walls begin to appear on the left while the medieval castle shifts to the left side of the frame.

events.description: approaching the village outskirts with stone walls and wooden structures becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the village entrance as buildings and stone walls close in

entered.detail: Medieval village houses and structures with thatched roofs on the left
Stone walls lining both sides of the narrowing path

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the village outskirts where stone walls and medieval buildings close in on both sides. The castle towers are now closer and more detailed as the path narrows toward the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from open farmland into the outskirts of a medieval village. It begins with Geralt walking past vibrant sunflower fields and a wooden fence under the warm glow of golden hour, with distant castle towers shimmering in the haze. As the path curves through the countryside, the sunflowers give way to grassy meadows and the castle shifts toward the left of the frame while stone walls begin to emerge. The scene then closes in as the open landscape narrows, bringing the detailed stone architecture of the village and the towering castle walls into immediate view. Finally, the camera follows the path as it leads directly into the settlement, flanked on both sides by medieval buildings.
